title: Trigonometry, Vectors, and Periodic Systems · Mixed Practice Return
summary: Plan bearings, slopes, cyclic demand, and resultant forces. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a navigation and periodic-demand model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use radians and the unit circle to define trigonometric functions and periodicity.
Apply right-triangle ratios with diagrams, units, and angle conditions.
Choose laws of sines or cosines and detect ambiguous cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Record what required effort

steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.
